name: Zoodles with Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut zucchini lengthwise into long strips that are 1/8-inch thick and 1/8-inch wide; set aside.
2. Coat scallops with cornstarch.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large skillet over high heat.
4. Add scallops and garlic to the pan, sauté for 2 minutes, then remove from the pan.
5. Heat the remaining tablespoon of oil in the same pan.
6. Add onions and saute for 2 minutes.
7. Reduce the heat to medium.
8. Add zucchini, tomatoes, low-sodium soy sauce, lemon juice, and oregano to the pan, stirring to combine.
9. Cover the pan and cook for 4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Return scallops to the pan and cover; cook for an additional 30 seconds.
